name: J. Dolan's
tagline: New York-style pizza and craft beer in Kaimuki — often cited as the best slice on the island.
mustOrder: pepperoni pizza — classic NY style, perfectly charred
craft beer selection — rotating taps worth exploring
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave; Kahala Mall lot nearby
talkStory: Named after owner John Dolan, who opened this Kaimuki pizza-and-beer joint around 2014 on Waialae Ave. The hand-tossed New York-style pies have a proper thin crust with good char, and the rotating craft beer taps make it Kaimuki's go-to casual night out. Dolan also runs the Irish pub J. Dolan's on Bethel Street downtown — same name, different vibe. If Brick Fire Tavern is Kaimuki's artisan wood-fired option, Dolan's is the grab-a-slice-and-a-pint neighborhood counterpart. Late night friendly.
